"'''Children of the Force'''" is a comic that appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales 13]]'' and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 1]]''.

==Plot summary==
[[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] voices her conflicted thoughts to [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] regarding her first Jedi extraction. Immediately afterwards Windu thwarts [[Vianna D'Pow]] during her attempt to kidnap one of the infant Jedi on behalf of its parents. Only a message that Windu had recently received convinces her to leave the child with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who returns it to its parents.

==Continuity==
*The comic shows Mace Windu taken from his parents as an infant by a Jedi in a flashback and that his parents wished to contact him despite they knew it was forbidden. However, the novel ''[[Shatterpoint (novel)|Shatterpoint]]'' released a year later stated that Mace Windu was an orphan when the Jedi took him to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Shatterpoint novel">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>
